<!-- One paragraph: what does this change and why. -->

## Linked issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. If there's no issue, explain why none was opened. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Build / CI

## Testing

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits are small and focused.
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] No unrelated formatting / dependency changes are mixed in.
- [ ] If this touches the trading path, I tested with `MOCK_MODE=yes` (and ideally a paper account).
